title: Intensely Savory Indian Potatoes Bake
description: A sour and shaggy lacto-vegetarian Indian dish featuring truffle oil, perfect for a lazy Sunday, wood-fired-baked to perfection.
instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, lemon juice, garam masala, cumin seeds, coriander powder, salt, and pepper.
Add the sliced potatoes to the bowl and toss to coat with the yogurt mixture.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the potato slices in a single layer.
Drizzle the truffle oil over the potatoes and sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
Bake the potatoes in the preheated wood-fired oven for 45 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
Remove the potatoes from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the intensely savory Indian potatoes bake hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
